productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Alto Multi Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style, you shouldn't deprive it of it! These Alto leather flip-flops from buckaroo offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. The fabric straps not just give you a soft feel, the tri coloured straps add a great burst of colour to all your outfits. It was never easier to look so perfectly relaxed and spectacular at the same time! Pair them with jeans or chinos and have a great day! Upper Wide, woven fabric straps in thong style for durability and comfort Leather toe separator for more comfort and moisture-absorption Cut thread detailing on toe separator for added attraction Midsole Firm footbed for extra support in all-day wear Branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Multi-drectional lugs all over the footbed for improved grip on all surfaces shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
